title: Catch 22: Based on the Unwritten Story by Seanie Sugrue
original_title: Catch 22: Based on the Unwritten Story by Seanie Sugrue
overview: With Hurricane Sandy looming on the horizon, five hard-lived friends come to from a send-off celebration alongside an unexplained dead girl. What are friends for?
